center.name: 烏盧古魯山脈
center.summary: 烏盧古魯山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Dark batis、Kenrick's starling、Uluguru violet-backed sunbird，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Eastern Arc Mountains of East Africa from the Ukaguru Mountains and Uluguru Mountains of central Tanzania south-westwards as far as the Misuku Hills in northernmost Malawi and the Njesi Highlands in northern Mozambique. It inhabits evergreen forest from above sea-level and is most common around

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Tanzania it is found in the east and northeast in the Usambara and Uluguru Mountains as well as at Mount Kilimanjaro and Mount Meru.{{cite journal |last1=Turner |first1=D.A

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Both have pale-gray underbodies. It is found in forests in eastern Kenya, eastern Tanzania (including the Uluguru Mountains, the basis for its common name) and north-eastern Mozambique
